rationale.R1.5: The agent strengthened the abstract by providing a clearer structure and more detailed explanations.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (no downstream errors, but no discussion of potential harmful patterns in the original).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
